chapter_title.en: Amīr al-mu’minīn's wisdom on knowledge and virtue

text: يَا كُمَيْل بْن زِيَادٍ، إِنَّ هذهِ الْقُلُوبَ أَوْعِيَةٌ فَخَيْرُهَا أَوْعَاهَا فَاحْفَظْ عَنِّي مَا أَقُولُ لَكَ:

en.sayed-ali-raza: O Kumayl, these hearts are containers. The best of them is that which preserves (its contents). So, preserve what I say to you:
